description_long: This is a classic, cylindrical fire hydrant with a domed top and a robust, industrial design, painted in a deep reddish-brown color. The hydrant features three prominent hose connection outlets: one on each side and one facing forward, each capped with a round, protruding cover. The top of the hydrant is fitted with a central operating nut or cap, used for opening the valve. The base is wide and flanged, designed for secure mounting to the ground, and the body is segmented with visible bolts and seams, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The surface shows a slightly worn, matte finish, typical of outdoor hydrants exposed to the elements. No chains, manufacturer markings, or additional accessories are visible on the exterior.
description: A robust, reddish-brown fire hydrant with three capped hose outlets, a domed top, and a flanged base, featuring a slightly worn, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central hose outlet and the domed top with the operating nut clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the lateral hose outlets and the cylindrical body profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two side hose outlets and the back of the hydrant, with the domed top and base visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front and one side outlet, as well as the flanged base and domed top.
